serviceNotes.engine oil: M51 EU Inspection I/II: Oil Service 15,000 km or 12 months, standard diesel engine oil.
serviceNotes.EGR / intake clean: Older diesel EGR/intake deposits; clean when drivability suffers (~120,000 km planning).

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW owner's manual E39 (EU) — Oil Service 15,000 km or 12 months, M51 525td/s diesel; Inspection I/II (pre-CBS)
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW owner's manual E39 (EU) — microfilter at Inspection II, 30,000 km
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW owner's manual E39 — brake fluid every 24 months (DOT 4 LV)
serviceSources.air cleaner element: BMW owner's manual E39 (EU) — diesel air filter at Inspection II, 30,000 km
serviceSources.fuel filter: BMW owner's manual E39 (M51 diesel) — fuel filter 60,000 km Inspection II
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW owner's manual E39 — brake pad inspection every 15,000 km with Oil Service
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW owner's manual E39 — brake pad inspection every 15,000 km with Oil Service
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW owner's manual E39 (EU) — Inspection II / vehicle check 60,000 km

serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: Haynes BMW 5 Series E39 — manual gearbox oil REC 100,000 km
